description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy resembling a character with a rounded, chubby body covered in a textured, gray fabric. The toy features two upright ears, large round white eyes with black pupils, and a small, slightly protruding nose. Its belly is a lighter beige color with a pattern of three arch-shaped markings, and the arms are short and stubby, positioned at the front. The back of the toy is plain gray, with a small pink loop attached at the top, likely for hanging or carrying. The tail is short and rounded, matching the body in color and texture, and the overall appearance is soft and cuddly, with a slightly worn or well-loved look.
description: A gray, plush stuffed toy with large white eyes, upright ears, and a beige belly with arch patterns. It has a soft, textured surface and a pink loop on top.
description_view_0: The left side of the toy is visible, showing the rounded body, one ear, and the stubby tail, with the pink loop partially visible on top.
description_view_1: The front view displays both large white eyes, the beige belly with arch patterns, both arms, and both ears clearly.
description_view_2: The right side of the toy is shown, mirroring the left, with the rounded body, one ear, and the tail, as well as the pink loop on top.
description_view_3: The back view highlights the plain gray surface, the pink loop at the top, and the stubby tail at the bottom.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with wide, round eyes and no visible mouth, giving it a calm and gentle appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is in a sitting posture with its arms positioned forward and its body upright, ears standing up and tail resting behind.
